textByHash.1350ffcaecbee080f17a2cc5a954ba46cbbfe22a: The Dark Altar. It felt the altar's power and wanted to consume it for itself. It wouldn't be the first time...
textByHash.23333b73d3223b1bb4dd610ee95dd656dd65ae63: I don't know, but I intend to find out.
textByHash.5dd1519c7e243bd368c606763ae878aef0a4949c: Better to be paranoid than a fool. Anyone with any sense knows that the Pyromancers are trouble. They say even Lord Arceuus doesn't trust them.
textByHash.664c7ff438fc5e529e7d767c0d2b90cac4c5c67c: I've heard stories about them and the things they have done over the years. Be careful, they can't be trusted.
textByHash.6aa72929db84a7fc4883758fbe91da73de4a80e8: Lady Piscarilius has sent me here to keep an eye on the situation. She doesn't trust the other houses and believes something sinister is going on.
textByHash.9e50070ead42db2f071adbe045bd075908afac7a: No one knows for sure but I have a theory...
textByHash.e194f8922f42ae79c902854f85d9b346507fd3fd: The Wintertodt terrorised Great Kourend many centuries ago. It destroyed much of this northern land over many years before it was finally driven back into this prison.
textByHash.f2fa658d690008c3e3295d38cf0467037a917ea8: I'm Ish, one of the navigators of Piscarilius.
